title: citrus × bigaradia var. hispanica
intro: Citrus × bigaradia var. hispanica, also known as bitter orange, is a plant species that is a hybrid of the sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) and the pomelo (Citrus maxima). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The health benefits of bitter orange include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and aid in weight loss. Bitter orange is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
